layout.layout_rhythm: peoples-platform: medium-high density, medium-low formality. Activist poster energy: blue, orange, red on cream, with Alfa Slab + Caveat Brush.
layout.spacing_rhythm: Reuse source spacing tokens and grid gaps: {"slide_gutter": "90px", "content_gutter": "120px", "topbar_height": "90px", "section_border": "6px", "inner_border": "3px", "grid_gap_lg": "90px", "grid_gap_md": "30px", "frame_inset": "48px"}

template_json_typography.style: heavy slab display + narrow grotesk + brush script + mono; protest-poster typographic stack

design_tokens_typography.style: heavy slab display + narrow grotesk + brush script + mono; protest-poster typographic stack

typography.typography_role: heavy slab display + narrow grotesk + brush script + mono; protest-poster typographic stack

cjk_policy.known_degradation: **Caveat Brush has no acceptable Chinese equivalent.** The "human interrupt" voice is structurally absent in a pure-CJK People's Platform deck. The two workarounds (drop the interrupt entirely; use Latin-in-Chinese for the script moments) are both visible aesthetic compromises — the populist-poster system loses one of its three voices when forced into pure C

template_json_palette.description: saturated political-poster palette: cobalt blue, signal orange, warning red, on warm cream with deep ink

visual_effects.notes: Derived from beautiful-html-template source signal: tinted_card.

image.strategy: Preserve source image regions and screenshot-backed composition; runtime generation must use traceable online/approved image assets, not local decorative placeholders.

font_and_typography_constraints: distinctive display face may be approximated by Slide/Source/思源 fonts; preserve weight/size/case first
letter spacing is preserved for Latin labels and reset/softened for CJK

extraction_receipt.claim_boundary: visual contract only; not a renderer implementation or fidelity pass

display.mapping_reason: 保留 Alfa Slab One 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

body.mapping_reason: 保留 Caveat Brush 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Sans Pro 与 思源黑体。

label.mapping_reason: 保留 DM Mono 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

metric.mapping_reason: 保留 DM Mono 的语义角色，但运行时优先使用 Slide/系统可用的 Source Code Pro 与 思源等宽。

font_strategy.mapping_reason: 根据 design.md/template.html/template.json 中的 font-family 与 typography token 提取源字体；运行时按 Slide/系统/Adobe/思源可用字体降级。

text_transform_policy.raw_value: no uppercase on CJK - Full-width punctuation （，。：；！？「」（）） - No period on display headlines (Chinese typography convention) - Pangu spacing 盘古之白 (space between CJK and Latin: `使用 Claude` not `使用Claude`) - One font per sentence ### Aesthetic Notes for This System People's Platform is a WPA-poster system built on three load-bearing typefaces, and **none of the three has a clean Chinese transfer**. **Alfa Slab One** is a compressed slab serif at extreme sizes (up to 540px) in uppercase. italic.fallback_when_unavailable: use color_shift or weight_shift; do not fake CJK italic
italic.loss_notes: Satori/Slide may not provide exact Google italic face; record as visual approximation.

underline.source_usage: source uses underline/text-decoration or hairline emphasis
underline.mapped_decoration: native underline only for actual text-decoration source usage
underline.fallback_shape: 1px-3px rule or border accent when underline font rendering is unavailable

line_through.source_usage: not present in source; default no line-through

emphasis.color_shift: use source accent color roles only
emphasis.font_family_switch: only switch between mapped display/body/label/metric roles from this family
emphasis.weight_shift: increase one role step within font_weight_scale
emphasis.style_shift: italic only when source_usage requires and CJK fallback is safe
